title: cordia alliodora
intro: Cordia alliodora, also known as Lankesteria or Cané, is a tropical tree native to Central America and Mexico, belonging to the family Boraginaceae. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used for centuries in traditional medicine, boasting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cordia alliodora include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Cordia alliodora include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
